get.description: Returns the list of scoring rules configured. If params are passed, rules matched the param value will be returned.

400.description: invalid module api_name is passed in module param value

207.description: Few rule object has errors, others are updated successfully.

post.description: Configure scoring rules for a module and layout.

201.description: Scoring rule is created successfully, but one or more custom fields are not created.

207.description: One/few of the rule object has error, others are created successfully
few ids are invalid and others rules are deleted.

204.description: No rule is available for the given rule id

put.description: To update a scoring rule name, description, field_rules, touch_point_rules or custom_fields.

delete.description: To delete a single scoring rule

400.description: given scoring rule id is invalid
given scoring rule id is invalid
given scoring rule id is invalid
Active rules per layout is reached.

enum: More than 10 scoring rules cannot be created for a layout

ModuleDetails.description: Provides details of a module, including API name and module ID.
ModuleDetails.title: Module Information

TouchPointScoreConfiguration.description: Configuration for applying scores based on touch points for Leads and Contacts modules.

name.description: channel name for which the touch point score are configured

rules.description: score configurations in the mentioned channel

score.description: Points that should be added for the touch point (Required in POST)

_delete.description: used to delete the TP rule

comparator.description: Field: comparator - for field like factors

unit.description: unit if days supported factors are configured

period.description: period for unit. (days alone is supported as of now)

TouchPointScoreConfiguration.title: Touch Point Score Configuration

UnsavedCustomFieldDetails.description: Contains detailed information about custom fields that could not be saved during an operation.

SuccessResponseDetails.description: Details of an operation, including the identifier of affected fields.
SuccessResponseDetails.title: Success response Details

LayoutDetails.description: Information about layout configuration, including display label, API name, and ID.
LayoutDetails.title: Layout Information

FieldScoreConfiguration.description: Defines the score configuration for module fields based on specific criteria.

score.description: Points that should be added for the criteria (Required)

FieldScoreConfiguration.title: Field-Based Score Configuration

ScoringRuleResponseDetails.description: Response details for scoring rule operations, including status, code, and associated messages.
ScoringRuleResponseDetails.title: Scoring Rule Response Details

ScoringRulePOST.description: Schema for creating a scoring rule, supporting both manual and Zia scoring types.

ScoringRulePOSTCommon.description: Root element for defining a scoring rule, including layout, fields, custom fields, and scoring configurations.

custom_fields.description: Custom fields can be configured for scoring rule. These fields will hold the referred scores.

description.description: Rule configuration info can be added here.

active.description: It defined the status (active or inactive) of the rule.

layout.description: Layout info. If the rule should be created for all layouts, this field can be skipped or set value as null.

ScoringRulePOSTCommon.title: Scoring Rule

ZiaScoringRule.description: Defines the scoring rule configuration used by Zia for predictive scoring. Includes main scoring criteria, training data, favourable and unfavourable conditions, and relational cross-filters.

scoring_record_criteria.description: The primary criteria used to determine whether a record should be considered for scoring.
scoring_record_criteria.title: Criteria object

type.description: Type of scoring rule applied, such as 'field_attribute_score'.

training_data.description: Defines the training data configuration including favourable and unfavourable scoring conditions.

favourable_condition.description: Represents conditions that contribute positively to scoring.

criteria.title: Criteria object
criteria.description: Criteria defining favourable situations based on field attributes.

unfavourable_condition.description: Represents conditions that negatively impact scoring.

criteria.title: Criteria object
criteria.description: Criteria defining unfavourable field attribute conditions.

ScoringRulePUT.description: Root element for defining a scoring rule, including layout, fields, custom fields, and scoring configurations.

custom_fields.description: Custom fields can be configured for scoring rule. These fields will hold the referred scores.

description.description: Rule configuration info can be added here.

active.description: It defined the status (active or inactive) of the rule.

manual_scoring_rule.description: Manual scoring rule configuration. Must be provided only if the rule is configured as manual.

zia_scoring_rule.description: Zia scoring rule configuration. Must be provided only if the rule is configured as Zia scoring.

ScoringRulePUT.title: Scoring Rule

CrossFilters.description: List of cross-module filters that further refine favourable scoring conditions.

items.description: Defines a cross-object relationship and the criteria applied to related records.

include_objects.description: It is the key used to differentiate, whether to fetch records matching the condition or not matching the condition.

relation.description: Information about the related module being evaluated.

id.description: Unique identifier of the relationship definition.

api_name.description: API name of the related module relationship.

criteria.title: Criteria object
criteria.description: Criteria applied on the related module records.

field_rules.description: Module field based score configuration can be added here

has_signal_rules.description: If TP rules are available in a rule, it will be true in sandbox case

touch_point_rules.description: Module field based score configuration can be added here
